chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Cr. Bail Appl. No.1256 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh case. 1. For order on MA. 7691/2024. 2. For order on MA. 7692/2024. 3. For hearing of bail application. 06.06.2024 Mr. Mutawali Khan, Advocate for applicant a/w applicant. == 1. Granted. 2. Granted. 3. Applicant Gul Zaman seeks protective bail in Crime No.15/2024 u/s 6,9, 3(E), CNS Act registered at P.S. ANF Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi. Learned counsel submits that the applicant is innocent and has been falsely implicated in the present case; that the applicant is not nominated in the FIR but police with malafide intention and ulterior motive inserted his name in the challan; that the applicant intends to approach the concerned court for relief in accordance with law but apprehends his arrest at the hands of ANF police, who is behind him to arrest, disgrace and humiliate him, hence he needs protection. Without touching merits of the case, applicant is granted protective bail for 06 days from today subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and P.R bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Nazir of this court. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of six days from today or surrender of the applicant before the concerned court, whichever is earlier. The Cr. Bail Application stands disposed of. JUDGE AK
